page_content: Visit the Omoide Yokocho alley in Shinjuku for authentic, affordable yakitori.
The Tokyo Metropolitan Government Building offers a free panoramic view of the city.
Le Comptoir de La Gastronomie in Paris serves incredible foie gras at reasonable prices.
Walk through the Promenade Plantée, an elevated park built on an old railway viaduct.
Rent a scooter in Bali for under $5 a day to explore hidden beaches like Nyang Nyang.
Eat at the local 'Warungs' in Bali for authentic meals under $3.
Take the Batobus on the Seine in Paris for a cheap alternative to tourist cruises.
Meiji Jingu Shrine is free to enter and offers a peaceful forest walk in the heart of Tokyo.
Tegalalang Rice Terrace is best visited at sunrise to avoid crowds and entry fees.
Visit the Louvre on the first Sunday of the month for free entry (seasonal).
